mandate: Rewire onboarding Step 8 to route to /preview instead of /pricing. Add skip link. Guard /preview against direct nav without onboarding data.
keyFindings: handleStep8 on line 408 was a simple router.push('/pricing') — changed to router.push('/preview')

Step 8 NavButtons had conditional label ('Continue to pricing' vs 'Skip for now') based on circleInvites.length — replaced with fixed 'See your secretary in action' CTA plus a separate skip link to /pricing
Middleware already protects all non-public routes with auth redirect — /preview inherits that protection automatically since it is not in isPublicRoute
Added an additional middleware guard: authenticated users hitting /preview without a couples record get redirected to /onboarding
whatWorked: The existing middleware pattern made it straightforward to add the onboarding-data guard. A single maybeSingle() query on couples by auth_user_id is cheap and sufficient.
whatFailed: Nothing failed. The changes were minimal and surgical.
recommendationsForNextAgent: The preview-page sibling agent should know that /preview is now auth-gated AND onboarding-gated in middleware.ts. The page itself does not need its own auth check — middleware handles it. The page can safely assume a couples record exists for the current user.
spiritContribution: Connected onboarding completion to the preview interstitial, ensuring couples see their personalized secretary demo before pricing. The skip link preserves user agency.
